name: Flashlight Battery
description: A fresh battery. The label has worn off but it still holds a charge.

name: Painkillers
description: Over-the-counter pain relief. Helps steady the mind, if only slightly.

name: Bandage Roll
description: A standard first-aid bandage. More comfort than cure.

name: Key Fragment #1
description: A broken piece of a brass key. The edges are tarnished green.

name: Key Fragment #2
description: The second fragment. It fits against the first like a puzzle piece.

name: Key Fragment #3
description: Third fragment. The key is almost whole.

name: Key Fragment #4
description: The final fragment. When assembled, this key opens the basement elevator.

name: Elevator Key
description: A heavy brass key for the service elevator. The tag reads 'BASEMENT ONLY.'

name: Wire Cutters
description: Heavy-duty wire cutters. Could cut through chain link or electrical wire.

name: Rope
description: 15 metres of nylon rope. Sturdy enough to climb or descend.

name: Spare Fuse
description: A replacement fuse. 20 amp. Exactly what the maintenance tunnel fuse box needs.

name: Distraction Stone
description: A heavy stone picked up from the courtyard. Throw it to create a distraction.

name: TRN-7 Sample
description: A sealed glass vial containing a faintly luminescent green liquid. The label reads: TRN-7 — ACTIVE. DO NOT OPEN.

name: Dr. Marsh's Final Report
description: The complete final report of Project TRANCH. Detailed documentation of the TRN-7 compound, its effects, and Subject H.B. This is the evidence.

name: TRN-7 Antidote
description: A synthesised neutralisation compound. If administered to Subject H.B., it may reverse the TRN-7 effects. May.
